svg.aria-label: Animated orrery: eight sun-lit planets revolving around a central star, periods following Kepler's third law
svg.title: Orrery — a clockwork model of a star system
svg.desc: A scaled Kepler system. Orbit radii are the planets' real semi-major axes (sqrt-compressed); periods are recomputed from the displayed radii so the motion obeys T proportional to R^1.5. Every body is shaded from the Sun. Pure SMIL, no script.
